justification: Announcement page quotes Trump naming Krishnan as Senior White House Policy Advisor on AI, explicitly stating he will work 'closely with David Sacks' to shape AI policy.
Official ACM Turing Award page naming Yoshua Bengio, Geoffrey Hinton, and Yann LeCun as joint 2018 recipients for deep learning contributions.
Official ACM Turing Award page naming Yoshua Bengio, Geoffrey Hinton, and Yann LeCun as joint 2018 recipients for deep learning contributions.
Princeton course page for SOC555/COS598J 'Limits to Prediction' co-taught by Arvind Narayanan and Matthew Salganik, directly evidencing their collaboration.
Official press release from Rep. Eshoo's office announcing she and Rep. Beyer jointly introduced the AI Foundation Model Transparency Act.
NPR article documenting the NRSC's AI-generated deepfake attack ad targeting Chuck Schumer, establishing Schumer as the target/critic relationship.
Article documenting Sanders explicitly pushing back on Trump's AI deregulation moves, naming both parties in an adversarial policy context.
Université de Montréal DIRO department page listing Yoshua Bengio as a professor in the Department of Computer Science and Operations Research.
AppleInsider article explicitly naming Ian Goodfellow as Apple's Director of Machine Learning and reporting his resignation, confirming the employer-role relationship.
Official NRSC press release about the AI Schumer video, with Joanna Rodriguez as Communications Director named in associated news coverage as the NRSC spokesperson.
Official Collège de France page for Yann LeCun's Annual Chair in Computer Sciences and Digital Technologies, directly confirming the appointment.
CRA award page for Lynne Parker notes her role as NSF Division Director of Information and Intelligent Systems, confirming her prior employment at NSF.
Alignment Forum announcement post by Jan Kulveit establishing the ACS Research Group at Charles University, naming him as co-founder and principal investigator.
RocketReach profile listing Stuart Russell as Founder and Vice-President of Bayesian Logic Inc. since 2011; no official company page found with both parties named.
Nimar Arora's own CV page listing his co-founding of Bayesian Logic Inc., directly confirming the founder relationship.
